Resume this subscription so it continues after the current period.

Payment confirmed. Your invoice is marked as paid.
Payment was canceled. You can try again from an open invoice.
Select a subscription to view invoices.
Payment is only available for amounts of or more.
Subscription is finalized; no further invoices can be created.
Complete your billing profile to place an order
Complete your billing profile to place orders and receive invoices.
Your server is being set up. This usually takes less than a minute.
Server setup did not complete. Check backorders or contact support if this persists.
No time logged on this ticket yet.

Search by title, description, or id
Type to search all tickets in this project, including done and closed.
Delete this time entry ()? This cannot be undone.
Only time entries fully within the selected range are included (start on or after From, end on or before To).
No unbilled time entries to bill.
Unbilled time is billed as the first invoice line. Add extra lines here if needed.
Only time entries fully within the selected range are included (start on or after From, end on or before To).

Period pricing is not available for this subscription.

We could not load the withdrawal addressee. You can still continue with your request.

Please enter a valid email address.
Required only if your service was already received or deployed.
Continue where you left off. Enter your confirmation code.
Code must be exactly 6 characters (uppercase letters and numbers).
Continue where you left off. Please confirm your withdrawal below.
I hereby withdraw from the contract for the subscription I provided in accordance with applicable statutory withdrawal rights.
You must confirm your withdrawal to continue.
Your withdrawal request has been submitted successfully.
Optional icon key and label text for the order page (in addition to the description).
Choose which integrated stacks and CloudInit configs customers may pick when ordering this plan.
Defaults for integrated stacks and CloudInit environment variables required by the selected customer options.
This plan referenced inactive CloudInit configs. They were removed from provisioning options. Save to apply the change.

No providers configured. Enter provider id manually.
Overrides platform environment variables for this service type. Leave blank to use the environment default.

Required for invoicing. Please complete your profile with first name, last name, email, address, city and country.
Your subscription is being provisioned. You can close this dialog and track progress in your subscriptions list.
Could not load provisioning options for this plan. Choose another plan or try again.
Could not load configuration fields for this option.
No additional configuration is required for this plan.
How users authenticate to the agent instance.
Prevents new user registration on this instance.
API key for authenticating requests. Required when using api-key authentication.
Used by the manager to communicate with Cursor for agent containers. Leave empty if not using Cursor agents.
Git configuration for the agent manager (repository setup, credentials, commit author). Leave clone fields empty if not using a remote repository.
Choose whether agent workspaces start from a cloned remote or a new local Git repository.
If you want this instance to provision additional servers via Hetzner or DigitalOcean, provide the API tokens. Leave empty otherwise.
Check the price summary for updated totals.
You may withdraw within the statutory period, even after the service is provisioned. Refunds for unused time are calculated on a pro-rata basis.
Statutory withdrawal is only available before the service is provisioned.

First name, last name, email, address line 1, city and country are required for invoicing.
When enabled, open invoices are charged automatically. Manual payment is blocked until auto-payment succeeds or retries are exhausted.

Enter a search query above to find documentation.
Official Decabill documentation: install, deploy, secure, and operate billing APIs, subscriptions, payment processors, and the billing console for platform teams.
Official Agenstra documentation: install, deploy, secure, and operate agent hosts, workspaces, tickets, APIs, and integrations for platform teams.
Decabill, billing, subscriptions, payment processing, invoicing, Stripe, billing API, billing console, multi-tenant billing
Agenstra, AI agents, agent management, distributed systems, AI agent infrastructure, agent platform, AI agent console, container management, WebSocket agents, Docker agents
Search Decabill docs for setup guides, API references, security hardening, billing configuration, deployment patterns, and troubleshooting.
Search Agenstra docs for setup guides, API references, security hardening, agent configuration, deployment patterns, and troubleshooting.

Thank you for reaching out. We received your message and will get back to you soon.
